rescore_existing_predictions.note: Only rows with existing gate30 predictions are rescored. Backfill rows require fresh ASR decode.

curation.next_required_step: Run ASR decode for the four backfill replacement rows for production/step50/step300, then compute final curated gate30_v2 scores.

curation_overlay.scope: lt_eval gate30 benchmark human review notes from public review page
curation_overlay.principle: Do not edit model hypotheses. Correct references, row validity, and benchmark membership, then rescore or rerun against the curated benchmark.

decisions.reason: A clean promotion gate should not mix ordinary ASR accuracy with low-volume robustness unless the bucket is explicit.

decisions.operator_note: Audio ends at 'tokia'. Current reference over-runs the voiced span.
decisions.proposed_reference: Ir antras dalykas, jus ko gero gerai zinote, kad Lietuvoje valstybine kalba yra lietuviu kalba ir tos baudos, kurios buvo skirtos, jos susiakumuliavo i tokia.
decisions.reason: If the reference includes words not present in the audio, production and candidate WER are invalid for that row.
Partially voiced reference rows are not fair ASR accuracy rows.
Partially voiced reference rows are not fair ASR accuracy rows.

next_steps: Create a curated gate30_v2 manifest that excludes removed/partial rows from the core gate and moves the low-volume row to an explicit robustness bucket.
For the truncated-reference row, verify the exact audio endpoint once more, update only the reference text, and keep the model hypothesis unchanged.
Backfill removed core rows with same-source replacement rows so the gate remains balanced.
Rescore existing prediction files against corrected references where audio is unchanged; rerun ASR only for replacement rows.
Republish the benchmark review page with Core, Robustness, and Excluded/Repair tabs.
